# Tendi

> Tendi is a private mood journal for iPhone and Apple Watch from Two Desks. It is designed for quick check-ins, useful journal history, and modest insights without streak pressure.

Tendi is planned for summer 2026 and is free, with no subscriptions or ads. The app is local-first: journal entries, notes, photos, voice notes, HealthKit-derived insights, and local insights stay on the user's device by default. If iCloud sync is enabled, data syncs through the user's personal Apple iCloud account, not through Tendi journal servers.

Tendi is a self-reflection and journaling tool. It is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or mental health condition.

## Primary Pages

- [Tendi homepage](https://tendijournal.app/): Product overview, launch list, feature summary, support links, and privacy positioning.
- [Tendi privacy policy](https://tendijournal.app/privacy.html): Full privacy details covering local storage, optional iCloud sync, HealthKit, Journaling Suggestions, optional analytics, widget and Watch summaries, Fider public-feedback processing, support/privacy contact routing, user-initiated Find a Helpline crisis resource links, Buttondown launch emails, the outbound Buy Me a Coffee support link, and Cloudflare hosting/security processing.
- [Tendi support](https://tendijournal.app/support.html): Contact information, practical app and data answers, feedback and bug-reporting paths, privacy information, and crisis-support resources.

## Related Sites

- [Two Desks](https://twodesks.app/): Studio website for the makers of Tendi.
- [Tendi feedback](https://feedback.tendijournal.app): Public, non-sensitive product feedback for Tendi.

## Contact

- [Email Tendi support](mailto:support@tendijournal.app): Product and app support.
- [Email Two Desks](mailto:hello@twodesks.app): Privacy, security, legal, and general studio contact.
- [Security contact](https://tendijournal.app/.well-known/security.txt): Security vulnerability disclosure contact.
